blocks.english: The Anaphora of St. Cyril; may his prayer and blessing be with our (head of state: King, Queen, President . . . ), unto endless ages. Amen.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: The Lord be with all of you.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: And with your spirit.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Give ye thanks unto our God.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: It is right, it is just.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Lift up your hearts.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: We have lifted them up unto the Lord our God.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: The Lord, God of gods, Lord of lords, the invisible God, Whose existence is unsearchable, is higher than all, yea, His nature is unfathomable.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: He is the consuming fire, the life-giving fire, the God of gods and the Lord of lords, Whose throne is above the heavens and Whose footstool is the earth, He is high and far away, and dwells in light.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: High and invisible is He Who dwells in heaven. He is clothed in garments of fire and adorned with flames of fire, His throne is on the heads of the angels, His going to and fro is through impalpable air, His high firmament is in heaven, clouds are His chariot, His way is in the stormy sea and on the heads of the angels who minister Him.
Deacon: Ye that are sitting, stand up.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: With their two wings of fire they cover their face that the consuming fire may not consume them, with their two luminous wings they cover their feet that his terrible light may not burn them, and with their two spiritual wings they fly unto the ends of the world.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Seraphim together with their leaders, cherubim according to their sanctification, the angels in their ranks, the watchful according to their armies, the heads of the watchful according to their tribes, the angels of fire according to their light, and the spiritual according to their position, give thanks and hallow with terrible voice, cry aloud, and on high, and while sanctifying they say : Holy, holy, holy, perfect Lord of hosts, heaven and earth are full of the holiness of Thy glory.
Deacon: Answer ye.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: Holy, holy, holy, perfect Lord of hosts, heaven and earth are full of the holiness of Thy glory.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: And we say together with them, Thou art holy, and wonderful is the holiness of Thy glory, Father of our Lord and Saviour Jesus Christ. Truly He alone is Thy Son, and Thou alone truly art His Father.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: His birth from Thee is Unsearchable. As Thine existence has no beginning, so Thy Son has neither beginning nor end, and as Thy days have no beginning His days also have no beginning.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: None sits at Thy right hand except Thy Son born from Thee, and none sits on Thy throne but Thine image Who is like Thee and is Thy likeness.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: He is Thy Son and the messenger of Thy counsel, Thy beloved Who is of Thee, Thine image, Thine appearance, Thy mind, Thy power, Thy wisdom, Thy counsel, Thy right-hand, and Thine arm; He is true God from Thine essence, the truly only-begotten Son.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: He was born from Thine essence, the Word perfect in all, Who is Thine image born from Thee and equal to Thee; He is like Thee high and wonderful.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Angels and archangels worship Him; through Thy love for man Thou sent Him to us because Thou has loved us.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Humbling Himself He redeemed us. He who was born from Thee and is like Thee was born from us in our likeness which is in Thine image.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: He, who is perfect like Thee and is Thine image, walked among us in our image.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: He told us about Thy being, and was made flesh like us. He who overawes the seraphim from the highest heaven suffered at His own will.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: We saw Him and despised Him Who is great before Thee. He is the glorious Lord among us, yet He is hidden from the watchful. Truly He appeared, and was born openly of our nature.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: He resembles Thee in image and appearance, was made man, came in the likeness of our flesh, lived among us in our image, and He is glorious like Thee.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: He flew and descended unto us, and suffered insult as we do. He flew and ascended unto Thee and He is honourable as Thou art.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: He, to Whom the watchful give thanks in heaven, was crowned with a crown of thorns and was crucified on the tree of the cross with thieves. He, before Whom the high ones bow their heads in awe, bowed his head before the crucifiers to suffer.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: A weak tree carried Him who carries heaven and earth. A narrow grave contained Him, before whom heaven and earth tremble, when He was buried in it.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Him who gathered the ends of earth in His palm and held the seas of the world in the hollow of His hand, they wrapped with linen cloths and buried in a grave of three cubits. He stretched forth His honourable head and the grave was filled with Him.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: He rose from the dead on the third day and entered where His disciples were, while the door was closed, and then departed from His disciples.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: While He was there, His glory covered the heavens. He ascended into heaven, sat at the right hand of His Father, heaven became His throne and the earth His footstool.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: He will come again to judge the living and the dead, He will thunder above and His voice will shake the foundations of the earth, and the dead will come out unto Him from their graves, to Whom be glory and honour, together with His Father and the Holy Spirit, unto the ages of ages.
Deacon: Look to the east.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Yea, Lord, it is Thou Who raises all by Thy word, who raised the dead through Thy death. There are among the unbelievers those who believed in Thy cross, there are among the sinners those who returned through Thy death, there are among the unclean those who were sanctified through Thy suffering, there are among the dead those whom Thou raised through Thy resurrection, and among those who were gathered together to judge Thee there were those who believed in Thee.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Thou did open the iron gate and will raise those whose bodies waxed old in the grave, and will awaken those who fell asleep in their life time, and will raise those lying in the earth, and will set free the slaves of sin, and will justify through Thy mercy those who were defiled.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: According to Thy mercy, our God, and not according to our sins. (to be chanted thrice)

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Through Thy mercy Thou reconciles the heretics, strengthens with Thy word those who return to Thee, causes the heretics to return that they may walk in Thy way, gatherers the scattered to enter into Thy paradise.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Those among Thy people who committed sin Thou causes to return unto Thy faith.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: O Lord, Thou strengthens the weak in spirit that all who live on earth may know that Thou art God and know Thy Son Jesus Christ Whom Thou sent, Thy beloved Son Whom Thou loves and who was born from Thee. Glory be to Thee with Him and with the invisible Holy Spirit, unto the ages of ages.
Deacon: Let us give heed.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: We offer before Thee this pure and holy offering for the sake of Abel Seth, Enoch, and Melchisedec, for the sake of Abraham, Isaac and Jacob, for the sake of Moses, Aaron and all the prophets.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: For the sake of Simon Peter, John the Baptist and all the apostles.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: For the sake of David, Hezekiah, Josiah, King Constantine and all the kings who have gone to their rest in the true faith.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: For the sake of all the bishops, priests, deacons, assistant deacons, anagnosts, young men and virgins.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: For the sake of all souls in which the Holy Spirit dwelt and to which the perfect Spirit of life was given. For the sake of all creatures formed after the likeness of our Lord Jesus Christ Whom Thou loves.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: For the sake of all holy men for whom this offering has been prepared and whom they have led unto Thy holy church and have drawn near before Thy great and holy altar.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: For the sake of all travelers, and wanderers on the face of the whole earth in true faith, and for the sake of those who have departed from this world.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: For the sake of every mouth and tongue which believed in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ Thy dear Son Whom Thou loves. Glory be to Thee with Him and with the invisible Holy Spirit, unto the ages of ages.
Deacon: For the sake of the blessed . . . (Anaphora of the Apostles: #6-9, p. 43).
At this time he shall mention the names of those who have recently fallen asleep.
The assistant priest shall say "The Prayer of Benediction." (Anaphora of the Apostles: #10-21, pp. 43-44).

blocks.speaker: deacon
blocks.english: Lord, pity and have mercy upon the patriarchs, archbishops, bishops, priests, deacons and all the Christian people.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: For the sake of those and all our Lord and God Jesus Christ, Thy church worships Thee and Thy bride exalts Thee with the goodness of the high ones, with the sanctification of the seraphim, with the praise of the cherubim, with the thanksgiving of the angels, with the prayer of the watchful and with the perfection of the saints :

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: With the purity of Adam, with the sacrifice of Noah, with the hospitality of Abraham, with the kindness of Isaac and with the vision of Jacob :

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: With the imprisonment of Joseph, with the patience of Job, with the meekness of Moses and with the praise of Elijah :

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: With the love of the apostles, with the prayer of the saints, with the labour of the anchorites, with the righteousness of the sinless, and with the humility of the pure :

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: With the courage of the pure, with the bereavement of the bereaved, and with the righteousness of the perfect saints :

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: With the remoteness of the ends of the earth; with the depth of the sea's whirlpools, with the flash of lightning, and with the flight of the clouds :

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: With the thanksgiving of the angels, with the glory of the saints, with the purity of the watchful, with the agreement of the high ones, and with the light of the spiritual ones :

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: With the right hand of the priests, with the death of the martyrs, with the blood of the believers, and with the greatness of the luminous angels :

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: With the striking of Thy Son, with the suffering of Thine only One, and with Thine authority which holds all :

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: And with the prayer which ascends to the Father of our Lord and Saviour Jesus Christ.
At this time he shall offer incense.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: Remember us, Lord, in Thy kingdom.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: In the same night in which they betrayed Him:
Deacon: Priests, raise up your hands.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: He took bread in His holy, blessed and spotless hands, looked up unto heaven, towards Thee, His Father.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: We believe that this is He, truly we believe.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Gave thanks, blessed, broke (+ three times, then he shall indent the Host lightly with his thumb in five places without separation). And said unto them, Take, eat, this bread is My body which will be broken for you as a propitiation for all the world for the remission of sin.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: Amen. Amen. Amen. We believe and confess, we glorify Thee, O our Lord and our God; that this is He we truly believe.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Again after they had supped, He took a cup, gave thanks, blessed, hallowed (+ three times) and said unto His disciples, Take, drink, this cup is My blood of the new testament which will be shed for you and given as a propitiation for all the world for the remission of sin.
He shall move the cup with his right hand in the sign of the cross.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: Amen. Amen. Amen.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Yea, Lord our God, hearken to the prayer of Thy servants and accept those who worship Thee before Thy face.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: We proclaim Thy death, Lord, and Thy holy resurrection; we believe thy ascension and Thy second advent. We glorify Thee, and confess Thee, we offer our prayer unto Thee and supplicate Thee, O our Lord and our God.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Let the flaming sword of fire, called "Shining" be drawn, and let the heaven of heavens be opened, through Thy righteousness, and with Thy will, let Thy living Holy Spirit descend, come and rest upon this bread and cup, bless and sanctify them to be the communion of the body and blood of Thine only-begotten Son, our Lord, God, and Saviour Jesus Christ (+ once over the bread and once over the cup and once more over both of them) for the forgiveness of the iniquity to those who draw near to it and remission of sin to those who partake of it.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: Amen. Lord pity us, Lord spare us, Lord have mercy upon us.

blocks.speaker: deacon
blocks.english: With all the heart let us beseech the Lord our God that he grant unto us the good communion of the Holy Spirit.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: As it was, is, and shall be unto generations of generations, and endless ages.
At this time he shall dip his finger into the Blood and sign the Body.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: And to all those who in true faith partake of it and receive it may it be for mercy, compassion, healing, help, life of soul and body, forgiveness of iniquity, remission of sin, resurrection from the dead, and new life, unto the ages of ages.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: Amen.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Grant us to be united through Thy Holy Spirit, and heal us by this oblation that we may live in Thee forever.
The people shall repeat his words.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Blessed be the name of the Lord, and blessed be He that comes in the name of the Lord, and let the name of His glory be blessed. So be it. So be it. So be it blessed.
The people shall repeat his words.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Send the grace of the Holy Spirit upon us.
The people shall repeat his words.
Deacon: Arise for prayer.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: Lord have mercy upon us.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Peace be unto all of you.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: And with your spirit.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Again we beseech the almighty God, Father of our Lord and Saviour Jesus Christ, O Lord, we have lifted up our eyes unto Thee desiring the descent of the Holy Spirit, we kneel to Thee with the knees of our heart, and we bow unto Thee the heads of our minds and spirits.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: O Lord, sanctify us with Thy sanctification, and purify us through Thy mercy, and make us worthy to partake of Thy holy mystery.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Let not this coal of fire, which we have laid before Thee upon Thy holy altar, be our accuser, and let not this bread of worship which we break be for vengeance because we did not purify our soul and our body.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: It is fearful to open the lips to eat burning fire and swallow glowing coal, if the belly is not purified from deceit.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: It is fearful to see the slaughter of the pure bridegroom in his pavilion.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: It is fearful to see the killing of the Son of the living God before His heavenly Father.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: It is fearful to draw near the flame of the Deity and to touch the lightning of glory.
Deacon: Pray ye.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: Our Father who art in heaven . . . (see Anaphora of the Lord, #69)

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english:
Let us, therefore, purify ourselves to take it and sanctify our souls to receive it and say :
Glory be to the Father who has been pleased that the pure fatted calf may be killed.
Glory be to the Son who is the pure fatted Calf.
Glory be to the Holy Spirit Who has made this bread the flesh of the pure fatted Calf.
Three names and one God,
Three likenesses and one appearance,
Three persons and one essence.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Worthy is He to be glorified by the mouths of the watchful angels, worthy is He to be sanctified by the mouths of the prophets and apostles from now till the end of the world and till the second advent.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: The hosts of the angels of the Saviour of the world stand before the Saviour of the world, and encircle the Saviour of the world, even the body and blood of the Saviour of the world. Let us draw near the face of the Saviour of the world. In the faith that is of Him, let us submit ourselves to Christ.
Asst. Deacon: Open ye the gates, princes.
Deacon: Ye who are standing, bow your heads.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: The Father was with His Son and the Holy Spirit before there were hours and days, before there were months and years.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: The One was not before the Other, and the Second was not before the Third. How swift is the speed of lightning and how swift is the movement of eagles' wings.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: They are united without separation, connected without being mixed, They live in Trinity, They are joined in oneness, equal in persons and similar in light and appearance.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: The Father did not beget His Son to help Him in His work before the world was created, and the existence of the Holy Spirit is not to contribute wisdom and work.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Let us speak of His birth from God the Father only. In that instance He had no mother because the existence of the creatures had not yet appeared. Again, let us speak of and proclaim the birth of Him Who is alone the Son of God, and, Who alone was born without an earthly Father from the Virgin, the daughter of David.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: His humanity was not inferior because He had no Father to be born of his seed, but was perfectly incarnate from a virgin only.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: As Eve's female nature was not inferior through having had no mother when she was formed from the bone of Adam's side, and as the building of the body of the first Adam did not lose anything when a bone of his side was taken away, so also the seal of Mary's virginity was not destroyed when she gave birth to the Father of Adam in the flesh;

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: And as Adam did not feel pain when a bone was taken from his side, also the Galilean Mother of God did not feel travail.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Thus we believe and thus we affirm that this bread which we break is the body of Christ which He took from the daughter of the Hebrews.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: We also believe that this cup is the blood of the Deity shed from the side of God's Lamb. We also believe that this sign of the cross is the image of Christ's crucifixion when He was stretched out at the time of His suffering.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: We bow before the altar of Him who is clothed with a vesture dipped in blood and before that vesture dipped in blood, unto the ages of ages.
Deacon: Worship the Lord with fear.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: Before Thee, Lord, we worship, and Thee do we glorify.
Priest: Prayer of Penitence (Anaphora of the Apostles, #72 - 88: pp. 47 - 48).
Deacon: Give heed.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Holy things for the holy.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: One is the holy Father, one is the holy Son, one is the Holy Spirit.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: The Lord be with all of you.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: And with your spirit.

The priest shall then lift up the whole Host with his hands and say: Lord, have compassion upon us, O Christ. (three times in a loud chant and fifteen times in a low chant). The people shall repeat his words. Then the priest shall repeat them three times and the people twice.
Deacon: Ye that are penitent, bow your heads.
Priest shall turn to the people and say: Lord our God . . . (Anaphora of the Apostles 95 - 96: p. 49; and then 97-138: pp. 49 - 53).
After receiving the Holy Communion.
Pilot of the Soul

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Then was our mouth filled with laughter and our tongue with singing, we who have received this indistructible mystery. O Lord, that which eye has not seen, nor ear heard, neither has it entered into the heart of man, Thou has prepared, O God, for them that love Thy holy Name; and has revealed unto us tiny infants in Thy holy church : even so, Father, for so it seemed good in Thy sight, because Thou art compassionate, O Lord our God.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: To Thee we send, unto the highest heaven, glory and honour, Father, Son and the Holy Spirit, both now and ever and unto endless ages.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: Amen.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: O Lord, make us, we whom Thou has called and sanctified, worthy of Thy call, keep us through Thy love, and strengthen us in hallowing Thee.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Keep us far from every evil and save us with Thy right hand in Thine eternal kingdom, through Christ Thy Son, through Whom to Thee with Him and with the Holy Spirit be glory and dominion, both now and ever and unto the ages of ages. Amen.
